entry.title: IDC HT940220D0002 (P00120) awarded to INTERNATIONAL SOS GOVERNMENT SERVICES, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: TRICARE OVERSEAS PROGRAM PROVIDES COMPREHENSIVE HEALTH CARE SUPPORT SERVICES TO ACTIVE DUTY SERVICE MEMBERS AND CERTAIN ACTIVE DUTY FAMILY MEMBERS IN DESIGNATED OVERSEAS LOCATIONS.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: DIRECT HEALTH AND MEDICAL INSURANCE CARRIERS

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:manufacturingOrganizationType.description: FOREIGN-OWNED BUSINESS INCORPORATED IN THE U.S.
